title: weihea ovata
intro: Weihea ovata, also known as the 'Vine Thyme', is a perennial flowering plant native to China. The medicinal properties of Weihea ovata include its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to improve respiratory issues and reduce inflammation. Weihea ovata can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water, making it a popular remedy for traditional Chinese medicine.
